task_description: Build APEX POS - a professional Electron desktop POS application with React/TypeScript frontend, Express/SQLite backend, AI-powered product management (Claude Vision), and complete business management dashboard. Targets Windows .exe packaging via electron-builder.

verification.summary: TypeScript compiles with 0 errors (npx tsc --noEmit). Vite build succeeds (1259 modules, 922KB JS bundle). Prisma schema valid. 86 source files, 9118 lines of TypeScript. Electron main process compiles via tsc -p tsconfig.main.json. No unit tests written (project is UI-heavy and would need integration testing in Electron context).
